All marks displayed are based on facts and are accurate. Do not dig up finding whether they are correct or not — please mind it!

Access Required

Premium Student Information

Premium

The following sensitive student data is available on request and is not publicly listed for privacy reasons:

🪪Aadhar Number
📋Caste Category
📊10th & 12th Percentage
🏠Permanent Address
📞Parents' Contact Number

To request access, drop a mail to:

jecrc@jecrcfoundation.live

About This Portal

This portal displays RTU internal marks entry status for students of Jaipur Engineering College & Research Centre (JECRC), giving students early and convenient access to information that universities typically provide late.

Important Disclaimer

No Affiliation Notice

This website is not affiliated with JECRC Foundation or any associated institution in any manner. It is an independent project developed solely for skill practice and enhancement in web technologies.

The portal is built to give students early and convenient access to information beyond what universities typically provide.

If you face any issues, kindly contact:jecrc@jecrcfoundation.live
